title: cymbidium aphyllum
intro: Cymbidium aphyllum, also known as the alpine cymbidium, is a type of orchid native to the Himalayan region. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory issues. The health benefits of Cymbidium aphyllum include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and reduce swelling. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations, often in the form of a tea or tincture, to treat various health conditions, including coughs, colds, and bronchitis.
